title: Day 04: TSITP Butterflies, Gym Mirror & Guitar Prophecy
mood: rom-com takeover, playlist discovery, gym mirror confidence, coding guilt, guitar dream
heroLine: Off Campus got dumped. TSITP entered. Butterflies are back on payroll.
body: Okay guys, blog time. Series update: I have completely moved to The Summer I Turned Pretty now. It is 18 June, 3 AM, and I am saying this with full chest: rom-com lovers, this is mandatory viewing. Fuck off, Off Campus series. This is the thing.

I should really appreciate the writer and Prime for not making up one more random off-the-book season, at least as of now. Just follow the book, guys. Why is this such a difficult concept for streaming people? The book already did the assignment. Submit it nicely and go home.

Passing thought: 13 Reasons Why is actually a great series. But why did it even need seasons after season 1? Stick to the book, guys. I loved it, then stopped after season 2 episode 1 because my brain said enough, this is no longer pain, this is franchise maintenance.

Again coming to TSITP: no BS, straight-out drama. After a long time I am feeling butterflies while watching a series. Like proper embarrassing butterflies. The kind where you pause and walk around the room like you are also in Cousins Beach with emotional employment.

Also, the songs. Guys. Full of awesome songs. TBH I used to think many English pop songs were just noise plus marketing. Cardi B especially, I judged too fast. After TSITP, I am filing a public apology form. She is kinda cool, guys. And I may be about to become a Swiftie. Dangerous development. I discovered so many good songs that I will share the playlist next week.

One complaint though: why do these shows sometimes insert identity moments like they remembered representation five minutes before export? Jeremiah being bi is not the issue. The issue is when the scene feels dropped from another tab. Luckily they did not suddenly turn it into a full awkward detour on screen. The drama train stayed mostly on track.

Gym update: leg day kinda sucked because there were literally no after effects. I thought I would fall, walk like a folding chair, become a motivational reel, something. But thanks to me being strong and badass, nothing happened. Zero collapse. Slightly disappointing, honestly.

But I do not know why, I felt satisfied in the gym mirror today. Guys, it has been almost a month since I actually looked at myself properly in a mirror. Wait, recently in Hyderabad hotel I looked once and confidence went to absolute zero. That story later. Today was different. Today I felt happy. Like super super happy. TSITP plus gym mirror somehow repaired one tiny part of the system.

Coding update: man, I am giving up already. I am really, really sorry, Mustang. I told my friend I would learn, and now I am not able to keep the promise. I became a proper mess today too. Appa said guitar is for useless, time-wasting people, and I got angry and threw the keys outside the home. Why? Because I just wanted one thing to learn. Dramatic? Yes. Honest? Also yes.

Fingers crossed, I will buy a guitar with my first salary as soon as I get it. But then I keep thinking, what will I do at that time? Will I even have time to learn? Okay, 8K it is. Let us try to buy it in July. Let us try, guys. Let us try.
Okay finally, important national question: which team are you on? Team Jeremiah or Team Conrad? I am asking peacefully, but your answer will be judged with full rom-com seriousness.

scraps.title: TSITP took the remote
scraps.text: Off Campus got evicted at 3 AM. Cousins Beach entered with butterflies and no apology.

Extra seasons: please stick to the book
Team question: Jeremiah vs Conrad, answer carefully

scraps.text: No after effects, no dramatic collapse, but the gym mirror randomly restored confidence.
